title: How powerful is the drill
wikitext:
[]: How powerful is the drill?             Quote Post by spaceythesun » Thu Nov 14, 2024 1:02 pm We all know the 6th Angel and Ramiel have drills but, how powerful exactly?

[]: Re: How powerful is the drill?             Quote Post by angelofgendo » Thu Apr 03, 2025 12:06 am The Tunnel Boring Machine drill is 17.5 meters in diameter. It was intended to breach 22 layers of armored protection above the Geofront. Each layer is approximately 18.25 meters thick, which is a result that can be estimated by observing the cross-section of the TBM diagrammed onscreen while Katsuragi is asking for status on it. NERV took apart Ramiel after defeating it, so they likely examined it. However strong it is, it seems to be at least as strong as whatever the armored layers are made out of. The actual drill head appears to be made out of some kind of focused set of energy beams, which disappeared after Shinji shot Ramiel with the positron rifle. So it is possible NERV doesn't know. Perhaps it's as strong as Ramiel's A.T. Field itself.

[]: Re: How powerful is the drill?             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Apr 08, 2025 10:36 am As always, the drill shouldn't have been able to breach anything because if you look closely it is turning backwards.

Article: How powerful is the drill
[]: How powerful is the drill?             Quote Post by spaceythesun » Thu Nov 14, 2024 1:02 pm We all know the 6th Angel and Ramiel have drills but, how powerful exactly?

[]: Re: How powerful is the drill?             Quote Post by angelofgendo » Thu Apr 03, 2025 12:06 am The Tunnel Boring Machine drill is 17.5 meters in diameter. It was intended to breach 22 layers of armored protection above the Geofront. Each layer is approximately 18.25 meters thick, which is a result that can be estimated by observing the cross-section of the TBM diagrammed onscreen while Katsuragi is asking for status on it. NERV took apart Ramiel after defeating it, so they likely examined it. However strong it is, it seems to be at least as strong as whatever the armored layers are made out of. The actual drill head appears to be made out of some kind of focused set of energy beams, which disappeared after Shinji shot Ramiel with the positron rifle. So it is possible NERV doesn't know. Perhaps it's as strong as Ramiel's A.T. Field itself.

[]: Re: How powerful is the drill?             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Apr 08, 2025 10:36 am As always, the drill shouldn't have been able to breach anything because if you look closely it is turning backwards.
